The player is at (2,2), immediately to the right of that box, so can push left right now—but that would jam the box into the corner at (2,0) wall area and is impossible anyway because wall. To solve box (2,1), I need to get below it at (3,1) and push it up. Cell (3,1) is reachable by moving down from (2,2) to (3,2) is blocked by wall, so instead route right/down/left around the central wall area may be needed. Immediate best step is to start repositioning toward the lower corridor; moving down is blocked by wall at (3,2), left would push illegally into box, up goes toward top corridor but dead end near target, right opens path around to reach below box and later maneuver box (3,4) toward target (4,2). So move right to begin positioning and avoid oscillation.
